common.bugTracker: Open Bug Tracker / File an Issue

dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.confirmClearHistory: Are you sure you want to clear your entire spoken text read aloud history? This action cannot be undone.

detailPane.selectSession: Select a session from the sidebar to view details.
detailPane.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.
detailPane.resetFontSize: Double click to reset to default

fileViewer.title: File Viewer
fileViewer.noPermissionDesc: This file is outside standard adapter workspaces. Grant read permission to view it.
fileViewer.confirmExternalOpen: This file is outside the workspace. Allow opening externally?

general.title: General Settings
general.cacheDesc: Speed up startup time by caching parsed sessions on disk.
general.pruneDeletedDesc: Permanently delete cached sessions when their log files are removed from disk.
general.logModeDesc: Configure how conversation transcripts are processed and summarized.
general.modeStandardDesc: Fast indexing without computing full turn diffs.
general.modeCompactDesc: Parse and structure compacted context blocks.
general.dateFormatDesc: Select the display format for absolute dates.
general.timeFormatDesc: Select the display format for times (12-hour or 24-hour).
general.showSecondsDesc: Display seconds in date and time formats.
general.numberFormatDesc: Select how large numbers and metrics are formatted.
general.secureStorageDesc: Use system secure keychain (Keyring) for credentials.
general.customThemeDesc: Adjust theme colors or generate randomized palettes.
general.excludedPathsDesc: Exclusions (comma- or newline-separated). Matching directories or files will be ignored in conversation lists.
general.fontSizeDesc: Adjust the base font size for the conversation transcript.

sources.title: Sources & Adapters
sources.desc: Configure raw log sources and formatting adapters.
sources.deleteDataTooltip: Clear Codeoba's local search index and cached sessions for this source (does not affect your actual agent logs)
sources.confirmDeleteSource: Are you sure you want to clear Codeoba's local search index and cached sessions for {source}? This will remove it from search results, but will NOT delete or affect your actual agent application, conversations, or log files.
sources.detectedMultiPromptMessage: Codeoba found the following agent chat histories on your system. Select which apps you want to index. No conversation data ever leaves your computer:
sources.detectedMultiPromptFootnotePrivate: 🔒 100% Private: All search parsing and index builds happen completely offline on your device. Optional cloud features (such as update checks) communicate only necessary metadata to our backend.
sources.detectedMultiPromptFootnoteEmpty: 🔍 Required: If you do not authorize any sources, search results will remain empty.

permissions.title: Path Permissions
permissions.desc: The following directories are authorized for reading/writing context files.

updates.title: Update Settings
updates.autoUpdateDesc: Automatically check for new versions on startup.
updates.notActive: Automatic updates are not active or supported in this build.

exclusions.title: Exclusions
exclusions.indexSubagentsDesc: Includes transcripts, commands, and file edits generated by background helper agents (this results in verbose logs and increased resource usage). Disabling this ignores background tasks, keeping your search index cleaner, and uses less resources.

readAloud.title: Read Aloud
readAloud.voiceDesc: Select the voice synthesizer for reading transcript narrative text.
readAloud.rateDesc: Adjust the speed at which text is spoken.
readAloud.pitchDesc: Adjust the tone pitch of the voice.

updater.title: Update Available
updater.description: A new version of Codeoba is available: v{version}

consent.title: Privacy & Update Settings
consent.subtitle: Automatic Update Delivery Consent
consent.descQualityReport: Please report any issues or suggest improvements using the {bugIcon} bug icon in the upper-right corner of the application.
consent.question: Would you like to enable automatic update checks to ensure that Codeoba is running the latest version?
consent.desc1: Update checks transmit the current application version and language preference, along with your operating system version and CPU architecture, to {domain}.
consent.complianceSubtext: This request is presented in compliance with global privacy regulations to ensure your explicit consent is obtained before making any server connections.

groups.noGroupsDefined: No groups defined. Click folder icon to add.
groups.tagInputPlaceholder: New group name (use '/' or '\' to nest)...
groups.deleteGroupConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the group "{name}" and all its subgroups?

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.desc: Have a suggestion, found a bug, or want to request a feature? Let us know directly below.
feedback.emailPlaceholder: Enter your email if you'd like us to follow up
feedback.messagePlaceholder: What's on your mind? Suggestions, questions, or bugs are all welcome...
feedback.attachDiagnostics: Attach system environment metadata (App version, OS)
feedback.success: Your feedback has been submitted successfully to the developers.

errors.sessionReadLock: Failed to acquire session read lock.
errors.onnxNotFound: Semantic search is unavailable: ONNX model/vocab not found. Please verify the application packaging or download the model.
errors.fileTooLarge: File exceeds maximum preview limit of 5MB. Please open in an external editor.
errors.binaryFilePreview: Binary files are not supported for preview. Please open in an external editor.
errors.authServerStart: Failed to start local auth server: {error}

licenses.title: Third-Party Licenses
licenses.description: Codeoba is built on open source software. Below is a list of third-party licenses and attributions for the libraries, fonts, and models packaged with the application.
